exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"], "score": [0.9, 0.4]})
df = df.set_index("cliente_id")
print(df.index.tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([0.9, 0.4], index=["C001", "C002"], name="score")
print(s["C002"])

import pandas as pd
s1 = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0], index=["C001", "C002"])
s2 = pd.Series([3.0], index=["C002"])
print(s1.add(s2, fill_value=0).sort_index())

import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
raw = "a,b\n1,NA\n2,3\n"
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(raw), na_values=["NA"])
print(int(df["b"].isna().sum()))

import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
raw = "fecha,x\n2024-01-01,1\n2024-01-02,2\n"
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(raw), parse_dates=["fecha"])
print(str(df["fecha"].dtype))

import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
raw = "cliente_id,monto,z\nC001,1,9\n"
df = pd.read_csv(StringIO(raw), usecols=["cliente_id", "monto"])
print(df.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C002"], "score": [0.4, 0.9]})
print(df.loc[df.score >= 0.5, "cliente_id"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [1.0, 2.0]})
print(df.assign(doble=df["score"] * 2)["doble"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame([[1, 2], [3, 4]])
print(df.iloc[1, 0])

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [0.2, 0.9]})
df.loc[df.score < 0.5, "flag"] = "x"
print(df["flag"].fillna("").tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [0.2, 0.9, 0.7]})
subset = df.loc[df.score > 0.5].copy()
subset["ok"] = True
print(subset["ok"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"score": [1.0, 2.0]})
c = df.copy()
c.iloc[0, 0] = 99
print(df["score"].tolist())

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region": ["lima", "Lima"]})
df["region"] = df["region"].str.title().astype("category")
print(df["region"].dtype.name)

import pandas as pd
s = pd.to_numeric(["1", "a", "3"], errors="coerce")
print(s.tolist())

import pandas as pd
s = pd.to_datetime(["2024-01-01", "no-fecha"], errors="coerce")
print(int(s.isna().sum()))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": ["1", "x"]})
before = int(df["monto"].isna().sum())
df["monto"] = pd.to_numeric(df["monto"], errors="coerce")
after = int(df["monto"].isna().sum())
print(after - before)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001"]})
df["cliente_id"] = df["cliente_id"].astype("string")
print(str(df["cliente_id"].dtype))

import pandas as pd
from io import StringIO
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1], "b": [2]})
buf = StringIO()
df.to_csv(buf, index=False)
buf.seek(0)
rt = pd.read_csv(buf)
print(rt.columns.tolist())

import pandas as pd
from io import BytesIO
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1]})
buf = BytesIO()
df.to_excel(buf, index=False, engine="openpyxl")
print(len(buf.getvalue()) > 0)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"x": [1], "y": [2.0]})
contract = {c: str(df[c].dtype) for c in df.columns}
print(dict(sorted(contract.items())))

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": ["x", "y"]})
print(int(df.memory_usage(deep=True).sum()) > 0)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1, 2]})
manifest = {"rows": len(df), "columns": df.columns.tolist()}
print(manifest["rows"])

import pandas as pd, hashlib
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1]})
blob = df.to_csv(index=False).encode()
print(hashlib.sha1(blob).hexdigest()[:8])

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Theory: loc uses labels of index/columns; iloc is positional.
Theory: SettingWithCopyWarning from chained assignment on view/copy slices.
Theory: errors='coerce' converts invalids to NaN.
Theory/iDo: manifest includes rows, columns, provenance/hash.
